sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛
items: Fixed PlayStation VR2 being unable to get into the game
Fixed ration screen being black
Fixed the info system not working
Improved Steam freezing
Improved anticheat system (Tomahawk)

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(Hotfix #1)
items: Added server-side monitoring to detect and flag abnormal network behavior patterns commonly associated with connection manipulation
Added a new charm (remove PDF)
Removed all association with Tactical Assault

sections.name: ➕New features➕
items: Added Hell let loose helmet skin (applied on the SSH-68)
Added Hell let loose clothing (full WW2 inspired outfit)
Added new bolt action weapon: Kar-98 with fixed scope
Added a new caliber for the Kar-98 (7.92x57mm)
Added new SMG weapon: M3A1

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛
items: Fixed weapons getting stuck on the backpack weapon slot
Fixed healing sound queue played across the map
Fixed Splinter cell NVGs breaking when removing helmet
Fixed held weapon not dealing damage after reconnecting
Fixed items from bunker interacting with market items (they should not be able to)
Fixed several edge cases making backpacks rotate
Fixed missing error when purchasing favorites failed
Fixed the whiteboard left portion not being erasable
Fixed pristine Nikolai figurine not spawning
Fixed a weapon preview issue when storing weapons on the gun wall

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(Hotfix #7)
items: Fixed certain items allowing backpacks to rotate uncontrollably.

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(Hotfix #6)
items: Fixed attachments not being able to be removed from weapons under certain conditions.

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(Hotfix #5)
items: Potentially fixed NaN issue (unable to grab items, it was also causing crashes) - we will keep our eyes on reports and metrics to confirm if it fixed it entirely or partially
Fixed grip priority in backpack (improved behaviors when grabbing objects near another one - yes, folded armor included!)
Fixed backpack spinning (if you run into an issue, please report it)
Fixed items saved in saving areas disappearing intermittently
Fixed an exploit that was boosting players upwards using car trunks
Fixed an exploit with flares being fired multiple times
Fixed an exploit where folded armors could be saved inside of other items
Fixed the issue where users could equip the ear pros while wearing incompatible helmets (they cannot anymore)
Fixed a crash related to the 1Shot chew bag
Fixed the .44 ammo penetration value (FMJ and AP)
Fixed the issue where users would save helmets in safe containers (they cannot anymore)
Fixed armor module falling down through the world
Fixed folded glasses and folded helmets falling down through the world after taking out of backpacks
Fixed an issue where the market UI would not update the available items quantity after purchasing
Fixed earpros floating in the air after taking them out of the backpack
Fixed a case where users would be unable to remove pouches from an armor after removing it from the backpack
Fixed backpack hitching against collision while running
Fixed a typo in the stats page (from "Felix killstreak" to "Fenix killstreak")
Removed NRS screen effects (there won't be screen effects anymore when using various NRS types)

sections.name: ➕New features➕
items: Added the ability to turn the mirror off (from the main terminal, bottom right setting icon)
Added Supporter DLC ( 4 tattoos, 6 gun skins, 3 t-shirts, 1 supporter patch)

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(0.13.0 Hotfix #4)
items: Fixed hand socket on the 9x18 ammo box
Fixed an issue with the splinter cell NVGs after removing helmet
Fixed a mirror sporadic freeze
Fixed the compass being removed in-raid after adjusting it in the menu
Fixed a glitch where closing and opening the backpack would allow players to run faster
Improved backpack's performance and removed ability to close backpacks that contain items while in hand

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(0.13.0 Hotfix #3)
items: Added blocking volumes on top of labs
Fixed some DLCs missing from the painting terminal
Fixed doors not being in sync for every player
Fixed loot boxes not replicating (being unable to grab loot inside after opening)
Fixed duffle bag creating performance issue
Fixed the duffle bag “placement box” (where you can store items) to be more accurate to the model
Fixed the PPK hand position when using “janky aim fix”
Fixed the PPK spawning without a magazine
Fixed main menu UI missions not showing received items
Fixed some missions visually duplicating in the user’s mission tab
Fixed tasks not highlighting red when failed
Fixed invisible collision after applying a bandage
Fixed an error with the generator trying to access an invalid index
Fixed AI weapon getting stuck in the ground
Fixed a case where a sound would play when you got close to the market in bunker
Improved missions UI (completed missions should now show in a different color)
Improved lighting in the bunker and Island of Tabor (another pass, more to come)
Removed the Crawler juice
Removed Sui Dab Blow Torch

sections.name: 🗒️ To Note:
items: Removed Crawlers and Sui Dabz items from these missions (PvP & PvE):
If you already have the mission active, please abandon and accept it again.

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(0.13.0 Hotfix #2)
items: Fixed having to level travel to get turn-in mission to register as completed
Fixed boss weapons flying away (they should now be put on the ground)
Improved NPCs performance optimization (only performance, not behavior)
Improved Loot boxes performance optimization (only performance, not behavior)
Improved overall coloring and lighting of the Bunker and Island of Tabor (more to come)

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(0.13.0 Hotfix #1)
items: Fixed PSVR2 black screen
Fixed shoulder patches rendering green in character creation
Balanced ammo loot to have more variations in raid

sections.name: Notes
items: PvP mode will start without its bosses. We are slowly introducing them back. Friday, Krtek and the collector are arriving. Sunday, all bosses will be back in Tabor.

sections.name: ✨Key features✨
items: Added 2 new guns
Added 4 new grips
Added 2 new cosmetic head gear + 1 protection mask
Several quality of life fixes, balancing and improvements!

sections.name: ➕New features➕
items: Added new Info system
Added new gun: Galil Ace Gen 2
Added new gun: PPK 20 SMG
Added new grip: Tigerclaw
Added new grip: Romanian DL
Added new grip: DD Vertical
Added new grip: A3 AFG
Added new magazine: VSS drum mag
Added Ruger 22 drum mag
Added balaclava
Added ski masks
Added ballistic mask
Added a loading message when switching game mode
Added a screen to the planters (instead of floating bar)
Removed time of day selection for Mall (now only 1 selection so more players get together)

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛
items: Adjusted Matka Miest kill volumes
Adjusted EULA UI
Adjusted Labs collisions
Adjusted Matka Miest collisions
Fixed an exploit with storage cabinet
Fixed old Island showing for squad mates
Fixed missing difficulty not preselected on PvE
Fixed PvE/PvP terminal text not defaulting to current mode
Fixed PvE/PvP selector not initializing correctly
Fixed bHaptics not working
Fixed belt-fed LMG ammo belt remaining visible and cannot be removed when empty
Fixed R61 chest rig stretching when equipped
Fixed magnifying scopes creating gun sway
Fixed Karambit knife not doing damage
Fixed weight not working after reconnecting
Fixed an exploit with destructible boxes
Fixed the incorrect SFX playing at elevator on Mall
Fixed Z-fighting near graveyard entrance
Fixed water bottle losing water after level travel
Fixed the trash can delete items if the players walk too close to it
Fixed the Blicky having an extra set of iron sights
Fixed an armor/backpack storage exploit
Fixed the Atlyn face shield remaining after removal when using fourth echelon NVGs
Improved the map preview image for squad panel
Improved tasks missions clarity with the addition of vendor icons
Improved shaders for performance across all maps (no visual changes)
Improved ration system (several additions)
Increased mag purchase limit
Rebalanced Foxtrot’s armor
Rebalanced market pricing
Removed dead vendors from the mission tab

sections.name: Club 80
items: Some people got the club 80 patch by mistake. We are removing the club 80 reward acquired via this issue.
The club 80 will only be available to people reaching the right player level, unlocking the mission and completing it.

sections.name: 🐛 Bug fixes & improvements 🐛 (0.12.0 Hotfix #1)
items: Fixed users not getting the reconnect prompt after crashing or being disconnected,
Fixed enemies shooting at players before they are logged in,
Fixed Splinter cell spray not working on the MP7,
Fixed a crash related to storage crates,
Fixed a crash related to weapon attachment,
Fixed  Streamer cam loading screen staying on when toggling power on/off,
Fixed quit screen hanging,
Fixed the CPU not saving in backpacks,
Fixed an edge case where the power station would lose collision while holding the circuit board,
Fixed a bug preventing from looking at a previously selected mission,
Fixed the tasks so you can only have 5 at a time (If you have more than 5 currently, you can still complete them but won't be able to accept new ones until you are under 5 tasks),
Improved the texture of the plant bed to match the seed mound,
Improved the plant station UI,
Improved the DLC terminal (added scrolling, Meta subsystem check for failure),
Improved the Main terminal (Added fallback on mission if the backend doesn’t respond),
Improved the receive terminal (screen adjustment)

sections.name: ✨Key features✨
items: New bunker along with several new/improved features including easy access to market, storage crates and more!
New weapon, the Honey Badger, which has been the most requested weapon by the community
New UI for the main terminal, improving on the previous design
Seasonal update including Christmas bunker, Tree, ornament and limited time missions

sections.name: ➕New features➕
items: Added the Honey Badger
Added the wipe reward (Honey Badger skin)
Added the Splinter Cell DLC
Added Christmas themed decorations in the bunker
Added 2 new Christmas missions to collect exclusive seasonal rewards that persist through wipes
Added a Christmas tree with collectible ornaments that can be found in raid to decorate your Christmas tree
Added back the Christmas themed music to the market
Added new bunker
Added new improved UI for the main terminal
Added market inside of the bunker (saving time between visits, removing the loading screen)
Added a new shooting range (it does not consume ammo while in the shooting range, hit your best shots!)
Added vertical storage to the gun wall
Added armor storage on gun wall
Added helmet storage on gun wall
Added armor lockers
Added backpack lockers
Added intel room requiring to place a motherboard, CPU, RAM and GPU to farm Korunas
Added free-placement storage cabinet to the bunker

Added geothermal energy (power station) to the bunker (you need to collect spark plugs and a circuit board to get it running and power your bunker - powerful alternative to the gas generator that is still present)
Added a new UI to the trade room pick-up kiosk (improved way to select items and collect them)
Added a new UI to the selling kiosk (separate from the pick-up kiosk with drops shelves)

Added crates to organize your items (including rifle magazine crate, pistol magazine crate, drum magazine crate, pistol crate, grenade crate, healing items [10 stackable items per slot] crates and junk items [10 stackable items per slot])
Added a physics based sock monkey to the bunker (community suggestion)
Added an MP5 drum mag
Added IdentX tag for staff and partnered creators
Added boots/shoes customization for players clothes (allowing a deeper customization and more variation on the battlefield)
Added DLC terminals to inform players of the new optional DLCs to support the studio
Added tactical goggles
Added the Club 80 gun skins (unlockable via a unique mission for players who reach level 80)
Added new posters in the game to support VR studios

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛
items: Fixed players being able to make night time render as daytime via OS time manipulations
Fixed NVGs not making sound when storing in the backpack
Improved weapon attachments reliability and performances

sections.name: ✨Key features✨
items: Added Time of the day and Weather update on IoT, Matka and Mall
Added a Terminator DLC
Added new gun grips and junk loot
Fixed a lot of visual issues, bugs and exploits

sections.name: ➕New features➕
items: Added a time of the day system on IoT, Matka and Mall (you will now be able to select one of two options that are 12h apart from each other. The time of the day will dynamically change as you play)
Added a weather system on IoT, Matka and Mall (there will be various type of skies with more or less clouds and a chance to light/heavy rain during raid)
Added a Terminator DLC (Rev 9 head, hands, gloves, sunglasses, leather jacket and Origin 12 shotgun with drum mag
Added a T-Pain statue to IoT along with a timed event with our partner at One-Shot
Added the ability to change gloves/hands model in character customization
Added new grips
Added new streamer items (cycled some out based on our current Creator Program members)
Added new junk items
Added new loading screens to all maps
Added our custom matchmaker ( https://stats.mm.ghostsoftabor.com/ )

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛

Fixed MP5 & MP5k needing to be re-racked after level traveling

Fixed the bolt lock release not working after loading in raid with the weapon

Fixed an exploit to cancel recoil
Fixed Mamba’s hood showing in streamer cam
Improved grips balance
Improved audio when opening/closing backpacks while using Ear pro (reduced the sound)

sections.name: Notes
items: What is Z-fighting? z-fighting is when two textures are fighting to be seen. It creates an uncomfortable illusion of two textures partially blending

sections.name: ➕New features➕
items: Added new ear pro (GSSH-01 and Peltor Comtac V)

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(0.11.1 Hotfix #3)

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(0.11.1 Hotfix #1)
items: Fixed junk items disappearing (if you lost some, we’re sorry. We will send compensation)
Fixed Collisions issues with Medium Wooden Loot Crates
Fixed headphones tab not showing at Minty
Fixed ear pro not storing on workbench shelves

sections.name: ✨Key features✨
items: We refactored the entire loot system, allowing us to have more control over the spawn quality and quantity. Based on community feedback, this was a major area to improve on. All streamers items can spawn in multiple locations on specific maps. With the change, PC components can only be found in computers. Loot crates spawns are dynamic, and might not always be in the same location.
We added ear protection. It will modify the sounds based on the protection you wear. Allowing you to focus on the sounds that matters!

sections.name: ➕New features➕
items: Added Ear protection (helmets that covers your ear will not accept ear protection)
Added several new items to the game (collectibles and junk) including high value items and boss figurines
Added new airdrop system and model (calling them with the flare gun is still the way, but you will have to unlock them by putting your hand on the hand scanner)
Added folding helmet straps so they can fit in backpacks
Added helmets muffling noise (certain helmets cover your ears and will muffle sounds)

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛
items: Fixed Ragesaq saber not spawning
Fixed Scavs being able to see through the escalator railing + railing in general around mall
Fixed grenade/smoke not going off if picked up by another player after the pin was pulled
Fixed the glitch allowing users to store multiple grenades in one pouch
Fixed the glitch allowing users to store two backpacks on the mannequin
Fixed a glitch allowing users to put a silencer on the flare gun
Fixed Mamba’s armor not showing in the bunker mirror when equipped
Fixed Mamba’s armor clipping when stored in a locker
Fixed water bottle from rations and market being half full
Fixed NVGs placement on several helmets (they were visually off)
Fixed several airdrop issues
Fixed LOD issues with the medium wooden crates
Fixed weapons with attachment stored on mannequin floating in place if you move the hand of the mannequin after level travel
Fixed an exploit using OVRAS on PCVR
Fixed NPCs climbing rocks
Improved audio per map
Improved NPCs performance (optimized hardware performances - not shooting better)
Improved NPCs logic for sound alerts (will go investigate when hearing a sound and go back to patrol if nothing has been found)
Increase draw distance for players

sections.name: ➕New features➕

Added Mamba Boss to Island Of Tabor
Added New Boss Weapon (TSVL-8)
Added Junk Items to Loot Pool

sections.name: Chodov Mall

sections.name: Notes:
items: Airdrops have been reworked with this update. Airdrops will now no longer spawn randomly, and will only spawn from the flare gun.

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(0.11 Hotfix #3)

sections.name: ⚠️ IMPORTANT INFO REGARDING SQUAD VOICE CHAT ⚠️
items: Squad voice chat has been temporarily removed from the game while we investigate a crash that affects our players. We will resolve the issue as soon as we can. Thank you for your patience and understanding.

Balanced all Stims

sections.name: ➕New features➕

items: Fixed an edge case where some players would get stuck in slow walking,

Fixed a spawn in mall where player could fall through the map

sections.name: ➕New features➕
items: Swapped Glitch energy drink for Chernobyl drinks

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(0.10 Hotfix #5)
items: Fixed XM250 exploit
Fixed M249 sound playing across the map when using a suppressor
Fixed bullets not being able to be gripped when inside of a container (mag, boxes, …)
Fixed the option to buy empty mags not working in market
Fixed the Taran tactical G34 not accepting Glock 33rd magazine
Fixed NVGs not being removable from helmet
Fixed pouches not being removable from armor
Fixed helmet not saving on saving areas
Fixed armors not saving on saving areas
Fixed Atlyn face mask being able to be attached to other helmets
Fixed helmet spinning when attaching NVGs in raid
Fixed hands rotating around the thumb (PS VR2)

sections.name: ➕New features➕
items: Added a full auto Glock
Added the dominator helmet
Added a region selector

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(0.10 Hotfix #4)
items: Fixed helmets dropping very high after getting killed
Fixed getting shot by Fenix on Matka Underground before being spawned
Fixed the damage screen overlay disappearing when opening and closing the menu in raid
Fixed screen calibration not saving (compass)
Fixed health system being visually stuck at 84% in some case
Fixed an exploit using NRS
Fixed exploits using backpacks

sections.name: ✨Key features✨
items: Time to kill (TTK) adjustment (faster)
OPK-7 offset fix

sections.name: ➕New features➕
items: Added NVG slot to the Ronin helmet

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(0.10.0 Hotfix #3)
items: Fixed MP5k sight being too high
Fixed OPK-7 offset
Fixed the ability to run max speed while sitting down
Fixed the fact that you could jump while sitting down
Fixed the fact that you could crouch while sitting down
Fixed an edge case where players would not take damage to the legs while jumping
Fixed the compass direction on the new watch
Fixed some issues with the new height calibration not being able to fit in some holes (like cells for example)
Increased .338 bullet damage to allow AWM to kill unarmored players in one hit
Increased promedol healing to match the new TTK
Tweaked break constraint for guns (leaving out of hands too easily)
Tweaked damage value to improve TTK

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(0.10.0 Hotfix #2)
items: Fixed magazines spawning near empty in raid (will now spawn with at least 1/3 of ammo)
Fixed rations spawning with non-full magazines
Fixed invincibility exploit
Fixed low level players queue not working (it was putting everyone in together)
Fixed Promedol box having fake syringes when being returned from the selling conveyor

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(0.10.0 Hotfix #1)
items: Moved height calibration back to the menu (and jump to where it was before - right joystick click - the previous bindings have been removed)
Fixed the samurai sword clipping through walls
Fixed Promedol pricing
Fixed various market pricing changes

sections.name: ✨Key features✨
items: Added a new health system with per body part damage. You can now get blacked out limbs with debuff effects.
Added a new watch model with an hologram to see your player status
Added a new healing item (Promodol)
Added 2 new weapons (M249 and MP5k)
Added 2 free wipe rewards (bunny ears and Tomahawk)
Improved missions and mission rewards

sections.name: ➕New features➕
items: Added a new health system (body parts)
Added a new watch model with an hologram to see your player status
Added a new healing item (Promodol)
Added bunny ears (wipe reward)
Added a Tomahawk (free reward)
Added variable ammo count in magazines found in raid
Added the M249
Added the MP5k

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛
items: Fixed the loot quality in keycard rooms on Mall
Fixed some wall exploits in Matka Miest
Fixed foregrip gaining collision in backpack
Fixed plant product gaining collision in backpack
Fixed 22lr box gaining collision in backpack
Fixed some conditions where the backpack would spin
Fixed the M16 and Galil Fenix accuracy (lowered their accuracy)
Fixed VOIP spam when it failed to connect to the VOIP service
Improved missions and mission rewards
Rebalanced the market (Bar is now level 3, MCX can only be found in raid but magazines are still purchasable, Stoner drum mags can only be found in raid and more pricing changes)

sections.name: Matka Miest Underground
items: Improved Matka underground lighting
Improved Matka underground navigation (added signs)

sections.name: Silo
items: Fixed an exploit allowing you to see in the walls of Silo

sections.name: ⚠️ Known issues ⚠️
items: Steam VR binding may need to be reconfigured. The jump button and calibrate button has changed and may not automatically be assigned in some conditions. Jump is not left joystick up/north and calibrate is left joystick clicked in.
Placing items in the backpack while moving will create jitter/lag on the hand
Wrong sound when walking on some surfaces in Matka Underground
Healing item may stay floating for other players after using them

If default VOIP is set to “muted” in settings, but manually changed to “proximity” in bunker (hand over mouth + trigger), on level travel, the watch will display “proximity” but the default setting will be applied (muted).

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(0.9.2 Hotfix #1)
items: Fixed an edge case where PvE and PvP would get mixed
Fixed shields so they have the same stat as the VEST B  (penetration and blocking values)
Fixed the fact that you could place shields on mannequin (you cannot anymore)
Fixed an issue with height calibration where it would offset the player
Tweaked matchmaking (it is not requiring full servers anymore - but we are still waiting on more fixes to improve matchmaking)
Adjusted shields spawn rate

sections.name: ➕New features➕
items: Added helmet slot to the backpack
Added 2 shields to the game (can only be found in raid)
Added the Samurai DLC*- Samurai helmet (C1300 skin)*- Samurai sword*- Samurai shields (small and large shield skins)

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛
items: Refactored the backpacks (entirely rewrote several logics to improve their behavior - this mean it completely changes the hitboxes and add collision to the sides of the backpack for better item placement)
Fixed the number 1 crash on Ghosts of Tabor
Fixed a crash related to an exploit
Fixed items not highlighting in red in the backpack
Fixed not seeing extractions after reconnecting
Fixed magazine collisions in chest rig
Fixed NRS not working if the cap is pulled and released rapidly

sections.name: ⚠️ Known issues ⚠️
items: The backpack is visually stuttering when putting items in while walking
Grabbing weapon on the backpack slot(s) can hit into collisions inside the backpack
Putting the grip from the weapon that you came in raid with, in a backpack can sometimes create collisions in the backpack
Shields are into their first iteration (will receive tweaking)
Shields can be put on mannequins
The generator is not properly tracking fuel when adding it

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(0.9.1 Hotfix #2)
items: Fixed a crash related to backpacks
Fixed a crash related to the IK
Adjusted the walking speed (reduced a bit)

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛(0.9.1 Hotfix #1)
items: Fixed NRS causing a crash
Fixed ammo loader not socketing magazines
Fixed proximity voice chat not working in raid
Fixed falling animation playing the running animation instead
Fixed player speed (lowered it a bit)
Fixed Rips car battery not being accessible
Fixed not being able to plant seeds
Fixed not being able to water plants
Fixed not being able to fill the generator
Fixed items falling through the landscape
Fixed some cases of spinning guns and backpacks
Fixed conveyor belt not working in the trade room
Fixed AP powder not going in the ammo loader
Fixed Grim skin not being awarded
Fixed the IK being inconsistent when running and not holding a weapon
Removed outside collision box on backpacks

sections.name: ➕New features➕
items: Added the ability to fold armors and backpacks
Added gun attachment to backpacks (but not the sling)
Added leaning
Added new animations for the player (to match the new IK introduced with leaning)

Added new NRS system (can inject anywhere, requires you to remove the cap, inject anywhere, click A/X depending on the hand holding it to begin injection and holding until it is completed or want to stop the healing process. Note that if you remove the NRS while it is injecting, it will keep emptying until depleted)
Added Grim skin (if you have Grim installed, you will unlock the skin)
Added a Meta review reward skin (if you reviewed the game on Meta, you should get the skin within a week)
Added streamer items (MetaSukiya's knife and TDVR's milk)
Changed how the scopes work (greatly improved clarity of the scope and they are more performant than before)
Changed adventure backpack models for a new one

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛
items: Fixed a crash related to grabbing edge cases
Fixed mission reward items not working properly
Fixed an issue where the NPC neck would not snap when grabbing their head with both hands
Fixed some collisions on Matka
Fixed some collisions on Mall
Fixed an issue where the Bizon magazine did not show in market
Fixed an issue where the Mac10 magazine in the market wasn't working (wrong magazine)
Balanced scav weapons spawning (example : sniping tower has more chances to spawn rifles, Matka has more chance to spawn Bizons)

sections.name: ⚠️ Known issues ⚠️
items: Taking off your backpack in bunker (and PvE solo raids + training in both PvE and PvPvE) may collide with your holstered weapon
Placing a folded armor next to a grenade in the backpack in bunker (and PvE solo raids + training in both PvE and PvPvE) will cause it to spin
Helmets cannot be attached to the backpack yet, but it is coming. We had to take it out last minute do to issues discovered during QA. We're still working on it.

NRS causing a crash. We are aware of the issue of the new NRS system crashing Ghosts of Tabor. This seems to happen when you stab the NRS over and over again, without using it (although we are unsure of the exact repo steps). It will work as intended with only one injection. We will be fixing this issue soon (as well as the mag loader).

sections.name: ➕New Features➕
items: Added Twitch drop implementation
Added a new grenade throwing system (assisted by where you are looking at)

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛 (0.9.0 Hotfix #5)
items: Fixed an edge case where a dead Fenix might still continue to shoot at you
Fixed placing two backpacks on your back at once would destroy one of the two
Fixed a visual duplication with items inside the backpack after level travel
Fixed eating with the spoon not decreasing hunger or thirst when eating
Fixed a bug where Sg552 could not receive the weapon skin pack 1

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛 (0.9.0 Hotfix #4)
items: Fixed the behavior of backpack drop missions (only visible if the mission is active and will only accept the specified backpack type)
Fixed visual duplication bug with the selling conveyor
Fixed footstep audio (when tilting the head and on several materials)
Fixed kill volumes in Silo (replaced with black vision volume - if you clip inside of a wall, you won’t be able to see. This will prevent death from hands clipping through the wall when climbing)
Fixed helmets visually duplicating in generator room
Fixed Matka underground metal detector sound only playing locally (everyone will hear it now)
Improved footsteps audio (new footstep sounds)
Balanced mission “Comm silence” from Shiro : removed the USB stick requirement (note that if you have the mission active, you need to abandon it and take it back to update it)

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛 (0.9.0 Hotfix #3)
items: Fixed the footsteps playing in the player origin location instead of where the player is in their play space
Fixed the main kiosk terminal not tracking the mission Secrets in the pages from Hana
Fixed a condition where the player would respawn/spawn in their bunker with 25% of health (after dying or extracting)
Fixed Mall vault loot
Increased the korunas % for quick sell (sell all) on the trading terminal (it will now provide more korunas than before if you don't mind who your are selling to)

Changed the mission Weapon cache from Sean, from collecting 5 SKS on Matka Miest to collecting 5 bizon on Matka Miest Note that if you currently have the mission, you have to cancel it and take it again in order to update it to the Bizon instead of the SKS.

sections.name: ⚠️ Known issues ⚠️
items: Your own footsteps may sound louder in one ear if you tilt your head (we are looking into that)
Abandoning raid can still result in you spawning in bunker with only a portion of your health

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛 (0.9.0 Hotfix #2)
items: Adjusted the NPCs
Fixed mall map loot (you should see more loot now)
Fixed Takistan sun growing too fast
Fixed locate POIs mission being inconsistent/not always working
Fixed storing items in maintenance room before you unlock it, the save area is not available until you unlock it
Fixed a crash when performing the missions for Rips (battery in water at docks)
Fixed PvE not having airdrops (currently only for 2+ players as it requires a dedicated server in order to spawn)
Fixed the cat not moving
Reimplemented the abandon button

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛 (0.9.0 Hotfix #1)
items: Adjusted NPCs line of sight
Adjusted NPCs reaction time (increase it to make it easier to kill them when you see them first)
Fixed incorrect loading screen on “waiting for players”

sections.name: ✨Key highlights✨
items: Added new map : Chodov mall
Added a new mission system (over 135 missions and 300 repeatable tasks are now available for a more varied everyday experience.)

Added solo PvE game mode (Separate progression from PvPvE. The PvE mode takes full advantage of the new mission system and refactored AI. Solo mode is a core-free update. To squad up, see Team Tactics information below.)
Added new weapon : MCX Spear
Added item skin system (free exclusive holiday-themed skin to claim before January 2nd)
Refactored the NPCs (to enhance your PvE and PvPvE experience, NPCs are now smarter and deadlier)
Many bug fixes and user experience improvements including preventing items from falling through the map, full list bellow

sections.name: 🌟Optional paid DLCs🌟
items: Added Team tactics DLC (optional DLC allowing you to invite friends to your squad on the PvE game mode. Note that only the squad leader needs to own the DLC. Includes 3 skins and 3 charms)
Added Camo pack DLC (3 different camos patterns)
Added a unique charm to each of the higher tier game edition (Founding Father, Independence Edition and Nuclear Night)
Expanded the content for the 1shot DLC (One new 1shot consumable, 2 new gun skins and 1 charm)

sections.name: ➕New Features➕
items: Added new mission system (over 135 missions and 300 repeatable tasks)
Added new map : Chodov mall
Added PvE mode (Solo mode is free for everyone. To squad up, the squad leader require the DLC - includes charms and skins for both PvE and PvPvE modes)
Added new Weapon : MCX Spear

Added weapon skins (Note that the following items will now be skins applied on items instead of market items : UWU pack, Steam GOTY deagle, Nuclear night M4, Founding father AK alpha and One shot M4. You will still receive one of each at wipe)
Added name reservation through wipes
Added wipe reward (Santa hat)
Added Charms for game editions
Added Christmas theme to the bunker
Added OWO vest integration
Expanded the content of the 1shot DLC (DLC - included in the 1Shot DLC - no need to claim again)

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛
items: Fixed several locations where items would be stuck under the visible mesh when dropped
Fixed an issue where items would fall through the map (may still happen in specific edge cases)
Fixed some Matka Miest exploits
Fixed a crash related to teleport behaviors
Fixed a crash related to distance grab
Fixed kill distance calculation
Fixed various issues with audio occlusion
Fixed some visuals and text issue on loading screens
Fixed knife kills not showing on end screen
Fixed a condition where the ammo loader would lose count of bullets
Fixed an issue where taking the magazine/box from the reloader before it was done loading created a desync
Fixed an issue showing no ammo in the ammo loader
Fixed scopes rendering sideway when put on side rail
Fixed a bug where shotgun ammo box would drop rows of 4 instead of 5
Improved spawning location on several maps (to minimize the chances of spawning too close from other players or NPCs)
Improved loot rarity
Improved sounds in the market
Improved sounds in the bunker
Removed the abandon button from the menu
Refactored the NPC AI: smarter, deadlier
Rebalanced AP - only found in raid now
Rebalanced the market (prices, availability and accessibility/rep requirement)
Rebalanced the consumables
Rebalanced night loot (more loot when the sun is down!)
Updated loading images on all maps

sections.name: Island of Tabor
items: Fixed the kill volume near the purple vault

sections.name: Silo
items: Fixed the “killing ladder” in Silo by tuning the kill volume
Fixed bullets only going through stairs one way on Silo

sections.name: ⚠️ Known issues ⚠️
items: Waiting for player loading screen may show the previously played map
DO NOT save items in the drawers of maintenance before unlocking that room. The room is unlocked by default due to the new skin system, but the drawers appear even if not available yet.
The cat does not get out of bed - holidays are hard

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛 (0.8.1 Hotfix #2)
items: Fixed an issue with the bunker manager that would sometimes not correctly perform the request (ex: putting a gun on the gun wall, but it still came in raid with you)
Fixed an issue where players would be stuck in the safe house loading screen if they had an invalid item in the bunker

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛 (0.8.1 Hotfix #2)
items: Fixed PCVR getting stuck on a black screen/loading when joining a level
Fixed NRS pouch vanishing from the armor after the player was killed
Fixed an issue where the player could clip through a wall in Museum - Matka Miest
Fixed an issue with VOIP menu settings not saving through level travel
Fixed an issue with VOIP where players would be very loud for the first few seconds
Fixed a crash with VOIP
Fixed a crash with the new "found in raid" watch mechanic

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛 (0.8.1 Hotfix #1)
items: Fixed a bug where shotguns impact would cancel other sounds
Fixed the height calibration menu popping up on level travel
Fixed an issue where the height calibration would prevent the user from seeing the reconnect menu
Reverted the changes to AP access

sections.name: ➕New Features➕
items: Added gun charms
Added NRS pouch
Added a pistol pouch module for vests
Added two new songs to the market (replacing two songs)
Added the 590A1 shotgun
Added back turn-in missions

Added new spawning logic to wait for the player's loadout to spawn before unfading (waiting for players screen to spawn people at approximately the same time - may take a bit longer than previously to spawn for some users)
Switched missions from local saves to backend saves

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛
items: Fixed screen going black when reconnecting (PCVR)
Fixed spawning inside walls (potential fix)
Fixed the AK side rail clipping in the iron sight on the AK-74U
Fixed an issue where the users were able to turn FMJ into AP
Fixed a few items that were making the backpack spin
Fixed some items missing wall hangers on the gun wall
Fixed a crash that would happen when spamming Deploy and Abort
Fixed an issue where the side rail of the Founding Father AK could not receive attachments
Fixed the position of the front hand on the P90
Fixed the ammo cost not showing correctly on the kiosk
Fixed an issue where doors were showing closed despite being open when very far away
Fixed the default position of the compass being too low
Fixed a bug where the geartech backpack would not save the gunslot if the weapon inside was put there by another player
Fixed moving grenades and guns going through walls
Fixed DLC weapon’s magazines being empty
Fixed some issues with the bunker cat
Fixed an issue where the back door of the church was closed at night even if the cultist wasn’t there
Fixed an exploit with NVGs
Fixed an issue where the ammo loader would show the previous ammo type even when unloaded
Fixed a typo on the Saiga drum mag
Fixed an issue where some magazine would not correctly save rotations on shelves when stored
Fixed a z-fighting issue on bullets inside of magazines when they were outside of saving zones
Fixed an issue where 9mm could be loaded in USP 45 magazines
Fixed an issue where the backpack would turn red
Fixed helmets not initializing correctly with streamer cam on
Fixed an issue where the M4 and Scar iron sights would go back up when interacting with other attachments while having a sight
Fixed an issue where grenade would sometimes ignore armors
Balanced backpack base weights
Balanced grenades radius and damage
Balanced AP (Jiri no longer sells it, Shiro level requirement was increased by 1)
Improve grabbing point of the Krtek helmet
Improved the grabbing area of the LMG suppressor and Barrett in the market

sections.name: Matka Miest Underground
items: Fixed an entrance that was making the screen goes black when stepping in

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛 (0.8.0 Hotfix #4)
items: Added an opt out 90FPS menu/Go back to 72FPS (Settings, game, the very last setting) Meta Quest only
Improved networking
Fixed VOIP initializing at 1.0 instead of user volume settings
Fixed players joining server too early

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛 (0.8.0 Hotfix #3)
items: Fixed a crash related to the audio system
Fixed an issue where the voice chat state didn't save on level travel (voice chat channel)
Fixed an issue where squad voice chat was not working when loading in raid
Improved reliability of the contact tab to lower the chances of seeing an online friend as offline

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛 (0.8.0 Hotfix #2)
items: Fixed an issue where servers were not working properly (matchmaking issues)

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛 (0.8.0 Hotfix #1)
items: Fixed a crash related to audio (highest crash reason in the past few days)
Fixed the watch compass pointing in the wrong direction

sections.name: ➕New Features➕
items: Reworked attachments (visible hologram to show where the item can be applied)

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛

items: Fixed kill volume in purple keycard room killing players

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛

sections.name: ➕New Features➕

Added new arms IK (fixing a crash related to the old IK)
Added velocity drop when using silencers (Silencers will reduce velocity and increase the “bullet drop”)

sections.name: 🐛Hotfix🐛

sections.name: 🐛Hotfix🐛
items: Fixed competing players spawning at the same spawn

items: Fixed the game size on PCVR (it was larger than it should have been)

Changed the energy drink texture

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛
items: Changed to color of ammo crafting powder jar to match the tip colors

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛
items: Fixed placeholder text in DLC prices

sections.name: 🐛Hotfix🐛
items: Removed smoke grenades temporarily due to performance issues (they are being worked on)
Attempt to fix the Krtek boss weapon to be the right one
Fixed stabbing the sand on island of Tabor resulting in an out of body experience
Fixed an issue with the MP5 where it was possible to shoot with the handle locked
Fixed an issue where the selling kiosk would not separate the used NRS from the full NRS

sections.name: 🐛Hotfix🐛

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛

Optimized scopes on Quest (preloading)

Possibly improved Performance

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛

Fixed material changes on guns and magazines for visual consistency and realism.
Improved VR gameplay with enhanced gunstock calibration.
Added subtle lighting to enhance the visibility of loot box contents.

Turning deadzone settings

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛
items: Fix If you put a mag into pouch and take it out really fast it will be invisible for some people
Fix not dying when raid timer was up
Fix IoT rock can see under it and shoot players from there
Fix lots of backpack spinning issues
Fix helmet attachment exploits
Fix for Virtual desktop performance issues

sections.name: Changed
items: Disabled selling purple key cards. They will be deleted when you try to sell them

sections.name: ➕New Features➕
items: Added SG552 (gun) in game

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛
items: Fixed vector buttstock issue
Fixed hunger sound playing between the ears instead of belly

sections.name: ➕New Features➕
items: Added fallback in case loadout never saves and player is stuck in "ghost mode" while extracting - temp fix, after 20 seconds extract to safe house

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛
items: Fixed stamina not decreasing

sections.name: Changed
items: Improved weapon physics/recoil

items: Fixed armor save exploit in Tabor Market and tutorial

sections.name: Changed
items: Improved grips

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛
items: Fixed NERDS going into the same arm you're holding it with
Fixed low health heartbeat sound playing only once
Fixed being unable to put items on a gun wall if you have a backpack in your other hand
Fixed several miscellaneous bugs and optimization issues

sections.name: 🐛Bug fixes & improvements🐛
items: Fixed backpacks disappearing in certain situations
Fixed some inconsistencies with grenade damage
Fixed infinite eating bug
Fixed on-screen blood effect being too intense when going into raid with slightly lower than 100% health

items: Improved handling of items in backpack - stop the backpack from tipping over when moving loot around
Adjusted loot spawn rarities

items: Fixed drawers in the Personal Bunker not moving items with them
Fixed bug where heavily customized guns were not sold correctly

Adjusted trade rewards
